cryptorate: My first React application. Cryptorate connects with external API - DatoCMS and shows data about cryptocurrencies. The app features pagination and work seamlessly across devices.
todo-list: My clone of Google Keep - simple TODO List. Application allows users to add, delete and rename lists. Users can also add, remove, sort and mark items inside lists as done.
tic-tac-toe: XOXO is a simple tic-tac-toe game with three game modes: multiplayer local, singleplayer vs computer and multiplayer online (socket.io). Game features theming and translations.
